title: Still I Remember

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: My God, my God, why have you gone?
Why do you stay so far from me?
My cries echo through endless dawn
But silence is all I can see

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: By day I call, but you don't speak
By night my soul finds no relief
While others rest, I lie awake
Drowning in oceans of grief

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Where are you now when darkness falls?
When hope dissolves like morning dew
They mock me as I scale these walls
Still I remember - I belong to you
Still I remember - I belong to you

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: They circle like lions in wait
Their words pierce deeper than thorns
"Let God save him," they mock my fate
As my spirit lies tattered and torn

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: My strength pours out like water spilled
My bones are broken, my heart exposed
Yet from the womb, your love has filled
Every breath that I've ever known

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Where are you now when darkness falls?
When hope dissolves like morning dew
They mock me as I scale these walls
Still I remember - I belong to you

sections.label: Bridge
lines: But you haven't turned away
You hear the whisper of my pain
Through the darkness breaks the day
Your love remains, your love remains
Let future generations know
The story of your faithful hand
From dust to glory, high to low
Your mercy makes the broken stand

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Where are you now when darkness falls?
When hope dissolves like morning dew
They mock me as I scale these walls
Still I remember - I belong to you

sections.label: Outro
lines: Still I remember - I belong to you
I belong to you

epigraph: All the ends of the world shall remember and turn unto the LORD
